title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tata Consultancy Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tata Consultancy Services
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
